entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
PATCHY FOG
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 60
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
